/usr/bin/ar qc libbomberman_logic.a CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Bomb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Explosion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/PowerUp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Stopwatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/Wall.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman_logic.dir/src/World.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbomberman_logic.a
